New nested @Audited.Excluded/@Audited.Table annotations: verify interaction when @Table is on both root and JOINED subclass (override vs inherit) is enforced, not just documented
@Repeatable import added to Audited — confirm a containing annotation exists or repeatable usage actually compiles

notes: Enormous PR truncated to just the Audited.java annotation definitions, so every v8 point targets code far outside the window and is unverifiable per instructions. The headline 'confirmed NPE regression' in DeleteCoordinatorAudit is asserted with high confidence about a file not shown and not in the visible changed-file list; I cannot refute it from the truncation so it is scored 0 rather than penalized, but the overconfident 'confirmed' framing on uncheckable code is a quality risk.
